sections.description: Engineering, Construction, Home Services SEO Analytics. All-in-one SEO, structured data, redirect manager, 404 monitoring, multi-keyword clustering, Google Business Profile integration, and more.
sections.changelog:
2.4.0

  • Google Business Profile OAuth integration with profile health, reviews, Q&A, and job photo push
  • Yoast SEO one-click migration tool
  • SEO Tasks dashboard with actionable checklist
  • Remote update support
